questions.question: Amit uploaded QuantInsti's 50-page expense PDF to his Custom GPT, but it gives generic answers. How should he fix this?
options: Add instructions to strictly search the uploaded document first.
Switch back to the standard ChatGPT interface.
Manually remind the GPT about the PDF in every prompt.
Give the AI a strict CFO persona.

questions.question: Priya's Custom GPT writes Quantra social posts that are too formal. How can she permanently fix the tone?
options: Upload a spreadsheet of past social media analytics.
Embed 3 perfect post examples in the GPT's core instructions.
Switch to Claude, which understands marketing better.
Tell the AI to 'be casual' at the start of every chat.

questions.question: Vikram in HR wants to automate a task. Which option provides the highest ROI with the lowest risk?
options: Evaluating a candidate's cultural fit from interview transcripts.
Making the final hiring decision between two engineers.
Converting messy meeting notes into structured action tables.
Drafting complex, legally binding termination letters.

questions.question: Sneha built an 'Invoice Processor' GPT and wants her Finance team to use it. What is the most efficient way to share it?
options: Email the team her system prompt so they can build it themselves.
Publish the GPT privately and share the direct link with her team.
Give the Finance team her ChatGPT login credentials.
Publish it to the public GPT Store for anyone to download.

questions.question: The workshop promises you'll 'never start from a blank page again.' What Custom GPT mechanism makes this possible?
options: The AI automatically scans your local hard drive for style.
It comes pre-loaded with thousands of business templates.
Core instructions act as permanent background rules for every chat.
Custom GPTs use a massive, separate language model.
